Phase-61.NAME: Tablet and Mobile Adaptation Closure
Phase-61.objective: Close responsive gaps on phones and tablets immediately after the premium QA foundation.
Phase-61.non-goals: Changing business logic, backend APIs, deploy/install scripts, or adding native mobile apps.

steps.step-1: Audit public, auth, user, and admin routes at phone, tablet, and desktop viewports.
steps.step-2: Fix phone density issues at 360x740, 390x844, and 430x932.
steps.step-4: Verify desktop layouts remain compact and not over-expanded.
steps.step-5: Verify mobile navigation, tablet split surfaces, bounded lists, and form control spacing.
steps.step-6: Run user/admin builds, responsive smoke, screenshots, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and protected surface guard.
steps.step-7: Document remaining live-only screenshot gaps if auth prevents local protected-route capture.

Phase-61.acceptance: Premium frontend is intentionally adapted for phones and tablets, not just desktop-safe.
